- Grey at (48, 47) - bottom
If I click on the top and bottom cells of the framed area, that gives the vertical pattern. But I already tried this.
Wait, what if the center pieces are not related to the 3x3 grid at all? What if they're just decorative elements?
Let me think about what else could be the goal. Maybe the game is about clicking on the source grids to "select" them, and then the game automatically copies their pattern to the framed area. But I've tried clicking on the source grids and nothing happened.
Actually, wait. Let me re-examine the center pieces. The bottom-left center piece has:
